videos.headline: Major Burns' pick-six seals LSU's comeback win over Mizzou
videos.description: Major Burns picks off Brady Cook for the game-sealing touchdown for LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Major Burns' pick-six seals LSU's comeback win over Mizzou) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Theo Wease Jr. reels in the over-the-shoulder TD for Mizzou
videos.description: Brady Cook's 18-yard throw finds Theo Wease Jr. for an early Missouri touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Theo Wease Jr. reels in the over-the-shoulder TD for Mizzou) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Missouri pulls out funky formation for 2-point conversion
videos.description: Missouri's formation catches LSU off guard and Brady Cook dives into the end zone for the 2-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri pulls out funky formation for 2-point conversion) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Logan Diggs leaps over Mizzou's defensive line for an LSU TD
videos.description: Logan Diggs takes flight for a touchdown to get LSU on the board against Missouri.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Logan Diggs leaps over Mizzou's defensive line for an LSU TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cody Schrader takes off on a 21-yard TD run for Mizzou
videos.description: Cody Schrader scores Missouri's second touchdown of the game after slicing through LSU's defense.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cody Schrader takes off on a 21-yard TD run for Mizzou) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brett Norfleet's catch-and-run results in Mizzou's 3rd TD
videos.description: Brett Norfleet bobbles the catch, but manages to hold on and runs in Missouri's third touchdown against LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brett Norfleet's catch-and-run results in Mizzou's 3rd TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Harold Perkins Jr. leaps up and picks off Brady Cook for an LSU INT
videos.description: Brady Cook's SEC-record 366 pass attempts without an interception comes to an end at the hands of LSU's Harold Perkins Jr.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Harold Perkins Jr. leaps up and picks off Brady Cook for an LSU INT) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mason Taylor makes Mizzou pay for its INT with an easy TD
videos.description: Mason Taylor gets into the end zone for a 3-yard touchdown to reduce LSU's deficit against Missouri.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mason Taylor makes Mizzou pay for its INT with an easy TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels finds Brian Thomas Jr. for 42-yard LSU TD
videos.description: Jayden Daniels airs it out for a 42-yard touchdown pass to Brian Thomas Jr.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Daniels finds Brian Thomas Jr. for 42-yard LSU TD) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Refs appear to miss Mizzou false start on Schrader's 2nd TD
videos.description: Cody Schrader crosses the plane for a touchdown, but the officials appear to miss a false start on Mizzou's offensive line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Refs appear to miss Mizzou false start on Schrader's 2nd TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels turns on the jets for 35-yard LSU TD
videos.description: Jayden Daniels shows off his speed with the go-ahead touchdown for LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Daniels turns on the jets for 35-yard LSU TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mizzou's Cody Schrader stumbles into end zone for his 3rd TD
videos.description: Cody Schrader won't be denied as Missouri retakes the lead over LSU lake in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mizzou's Cody Schrader stumbles into end zone for his 3rd TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Malik Nabers makes the catch and walks in a 29-yard LSU TD
videos.description: Malik Nabers is left wide open by Missouri and takes advantage with an easy touchdown for LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Malik Nabers makes the catch and walks in a 29-yard LSU TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET
